content.full_text:
May 4, 1992

Mr. Ben Davidian  
Chairman  
Fair Political Practices Commission  
428 J Street, Suite 800  
Sacramento, California 95804-0807

Re: City of Anaheim Request for Informal Assistance  
Your File No. I-92-218

Dear Mr. Davidian:

Pursuant to our telephone conversation this date, attached please find my questions concerning the above-referenced assistance letter dated April 29, 1992.

As we discussed, a telephone reply to these questions would be sufficient for my purposes unless you feel the need to respond in writing.

If you have any questions or need further clarifications concerning my inquiries, please do not hesitate to call.

Thank you again for assistance in this matter.

Very truly yours,

JACK L. WHITE  
City Attorney

Attachment

c: Wayne Ordos, Executive Director, FPPC
